title: ONESAVE Dog Leads For Large Dogs Training Extra Long Line Dog Lead 1.5m 3m 6m 10m 15m 20m 30m Puppy Dogs Large Recall Longline Leash Pet Walking Obedience Outdoor Play
features: DURABLE & STRONG : This long leads for dog training is made from high-quality materials to withstand pulling and active training sessions.
COMFORT GRIP HANDLE: This long line training dog lead is ergonomic padded handle which ensures the dog leash a secure and comfortable grip for long walks or training.
TANGLE-FREE SWIVEL CLIP: This dog long line is heavy-duty, and the training lead have 360° swivel clip which prevents tangles during movement.
LIGHTWEIGHT YET STURDY: This long lead designed to be light enough for daily use, yet tough enough for strong dogs.

SUITABLE FOR ALL: This Onesave longline dog lead is suitable for all size dog and for all breed. And this dog long dog lead suitable for all dog breeds like Pomeranian , French Bulldog, Golden Retriever, German Shepherd etc.
description: Product Description Onesave – Made for the Walk That Matters At Onesave, we create durable, stylish dog gear built for real-life walks and real-world dogs. From training to daily strolls, our leads are designed for comfort, control, and lasting quality — so every step you take together feels just right. Long Dog Training Leash Lead - The Ultimate Training Companion for You and Your Furry Friend Description: This puppy training leash lead can provide the dog or puppy with more freedom. You should not worry about them getting lost as they are free to run or walk about the lawn, beach, or other open areas. We have eight options of long line training dog lead available to suit various interests. The long lead for dogs outside can be trained to be used for long-distance walking or for teaching dog recall, while the shorter lead can be used for regular walks. This training lead for dogs is made of sturdy nylon and is easy to put on and take off. It is also very durable. The dog may wander depending on the length of the leash line, but it will always obey your commands. With a long line for dogs that are not elastic, you and your dog can walk or run a good distance apart while maintaining the ideal balance between control and freedom. Dogs frequently run across roads or run long distances unintentionally. Extra freedom can be obtained when training a dog with a long dog training rope lead. Dogs on training leads are allowed to walk freely and can maintain a certain distance from their owners. When it's necessary, you can step on the lead rope to safety. Select the necessary length, which is ideal for regular jogging, walking, training, and other outdoor activities. The rotating buckle on the dog leads is sturdy, easy to hook, and tangle-free. The dog is able to walk, run, and play in any direction thanks to the strong hook's 360° rotation and easy attachment to the collar. We also hope you can keep an eye on how the hook is being used. The recall training lead can make the dog run freely, and teach your dog to recall and train obedience tracking. It can be controlled by the strong lead rope when walking in public places. It is suitable for large, medium, and small dogs, and very suitable for hiking, camping, training, hunting, backyard, beach, outdoor sports, or swimming. Features: Durable & Secure Handling: Crafted with premium, heavy-duty nylon, this leash ensures lasting durability and comfortable control during training sessions or outdoor adventures. Its sturdy construction withstands tugging and ensures a secure grip while handling energetic pets. Enhanced Training Support: Offering an extended length, this leash provides ample space for training commands and exercises, facilitating effective recall and leash training for larger breeds. Its length allows for controlled freedom without compromising safety. Weather-Resistant Reliability: Built to brave various weather conditions, this leash is weather-resistant, making it an ideal choice for walks or activities in rain, snow, or sunshine. The durable material remains robust, even in challenging environments. Versatile Application: Designed for multiple applications, this heavy-duty lead suits various activities like hiking, camping, or casual walks. Its strength and length offer optimal flexibility for different training needs and outdoor explorations. Reflective Safety Feature: Boasting an integrated reflective strip, this leash prioritizes safety by enhancing visibility in low-light conditions. It ensures better visibility during evening walks, ensuring the safety of both you and your furry companion. Specifications: Material: High-grade, heavy-duty nylon construction for durability and strength. Length: Extra-long lead measuring [specify length] for enhanced training and outdoor activities. Clasp Type: Robust and reliable metal clasp with a secure locking mechanism. Weight Capacity: Designed to withstand the pull and weight of large and active dogs. Width: Wide strap design for added durability and comfortable handling. Weather Resistance: Weatherproof material suitable for various outdoor conditions. Ease of Cleaning: Washable material for convenient maintenance and hygiene. Reflective Strip: Integrated reflective strip for improved visibility during low-light conditions. Multi-Functional Use: Versatile for training, hiking, camping, or daily walks. Color Options: Available in multiple color variations to suit different preferences.
